q: Which data structure uses LIFO order?
ans: Stack follows Last In First Out (LIFO). The last element pushed is the first to be popped.

q: Explain the difference between == and === in JavaScript.
ans: == does type coercion before comparison (e.g. '5' == 5 is true). === checks value AND type strictly, so '5' === 5 is false.

q: Write a Python function to find the factorial of a number using recursion.
What is the time complexity of binary search?
ans: Binary search divides the array in half at each step, so the time complexity is O(log n). This is much faster than linear search O(n) for large sorted arrays.
